blockingIssues.description: Auto-refresh integration regressed: progressive compare flow resolves without payload, but auto-refresh start condition still checks comparison.payload and stops refresh.
Single-router swaps can incorrectly trigger the confirmation modal before stream completion because singleRouterMode is set only on complete event.
Swap confirmation modal is missing keyboard focus trap, so Tab navigation can escape the dialog while open.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update fullstack-worker modal guidance to explicitly require focus trap behavior when mission requirements call for MEV-modal parity or accessibility-complete dialogs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: swap-confirmation-modal review found missing focus trap in src/server.ts modal handlers despite meeting overlay/Escape/aria requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow non-UI or test-only fixes to skip mandatory Playwright/manual interaction checks when verification is fully covered by typecheck/lint/tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-typecheck-progressive-tests was correctly validated with static checks only; current procedure text still implies manual browser checks are always required.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen TDD enforcement wording so workers run and capture a failing test state before large server/UI edits when adding behavior-changing features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: progressive-quotes-implementation transcript shows substantial server edits before new /compare-stream tests were added.

rejectedObservations.observation: Address truncation ambiguity between 'never truncate addresses' and compare-stream logs slicing address prefixes.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: observation is about internal logging, while guidance is primarily user-visible/API behavior; needs orchestrator policy decision before applying.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add library note that strict ESLint rules disallow non-null assertions in TypeScript test fixes.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented-source: eslint.config.js is the canonical source of this rule, so no additional library update was applied in this pass.
